parameters.text:
⚠️ Please send a *voice message* to create a task\.

Just record and send a voice note describing what you need to do — I'll transcribe it and add a structured task to Notion automatically\! 🎙️

meta.notes: SETUP INSTRUCTIONS: 1) Create a Telegram bot via @BotFather and get your token. 2) In n8n, add a Telegram credential with that token. 3) Get your OpenAI API key from platform.openai.com. 4) Create a Notion integration at notion.so/my-integrations and get the Internal Integration Token. 5) Create a Notion database with these properties: Name (title), Status (select: To Do/In Progress/Done), Priority (select: High/Medium/Low), Project (select), Tags (multi_select), Source (rich_text). 6) Share the database with your Notion integration. 7) Replace all YOUR_* placeholders in the Extract Config node. 8) Activate the workflow — your Telegram bot is now a voice-to-task machine.
